# ADO Test Case Formatting

## Goal

- Produce test steps and expected results that paste cleanly into ADO.

## Input

- Test case drafts and QA workflow instructions.

## Constraints

- Keep steps simple, clear, and one action per step.
- Pair each step with explicit expected result.
- Avoid symbols and formatting that break ADO rendering.
- Do not add end-of-response summaries.

## Expected Output

- ADO-ready test content with predictable formatting.
- Explicit and verifiable step-to-result mapping.
